items.name_en: STEAMER Series M81783 Uninspected Version#
items.name_cn:
STEAMER Series M81783 Uninspected Version#
▇ Size: 18*11*6.5cm ▇
A long-awaited Steamer series.
The bag size is designed just right, interpreting a style concept suitable for both men and women, full of vintage charm. The black Monogram is versatile and eye-catching, and the full leather corners add texture to the bag, creating an instant urge to buy.
The carrying effect is beyond imagination, I love it!
High capacity, a daily essential for going out, the ultimate style icon!

items.name_en: TILSITT Series M46548 Uninspected Version#
items.name_cn:
TILSITT Series M46548 Uninspected Version#
▪️24*18*7cm▪️
An exquisite urban style featuring geometric lines on the bag body.
The fan-shaped silhouette paired with exquisite handles offers unique recognition!
Casual yet simple and elegant, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody!
Perfect for commuting or going out!
Simple yet distinctive style!

items.name_en: Top Grade✨【Nano Diane Baguette Handbag】M14194 White (White Multicolour - Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
Top Grade✨【Nano Diane Baguette Handbag】M14194 White (White Multicolour - Takashi Murakami)
The Nano Diane in two-tone Monogram Empreinte LT leather is a miniaturized version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all key details of the original design, including the round flap, piped edges, and strap-style magnetic closure. Its removable handle and detachable adjustable shoulder strap offer different carrying options.
Dimensions: 19 x 10.5 x 6cm

specs.rawTitle:
Top Grade✨【Nano Diane Baguette Handbag】M14194 White (White Multicolour - Takashi Murakami)
The Nano Diane in two-tone Monogram Empreinte LT leather is a miniaturized version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all key details of the original design, including the round flap, piped edges, and strap-style magnetic closure. Its removable handle and detachable adjustable shoulder strap offer different carrying options.
Dimensions: 19 x 10.5 x 6cm

items.name_en: Top Quality Unreleased Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷【SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25 Handbag】M13085 White Pop (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
Top Quality Unreleased Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷【SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25 Handbag】M13085 White Pop (Takashi Murakami)
This Speedy Bandoulière 25 features the classic Monogram pattern in the vivid colors of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing the dynamic style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration with the bow-shaped key pouch. Calfskin creates the Toron handle and a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap. The dazzling lock and corner reinforcements draw inspiration from the brand's luggage elements.
Dimensions: 25 x 19 x 15cm

items.name_en: Top-tier ✨【Alma BB Handbag】M53152 Multicolore
items.name_cn:
Top-tier ✨【Alma BB Handbag】M53152 Multicolore
M13078 Multicolore
As a tribute to the City of Light, Paris, the Monogram Multicolore series presents this Alma BB handbag. Monogram Multicolore canvas shapes an Art Deco silhouette, the Louis Vuitton Paris logo appears like a Paris street sign, and the central stripes reiterate classic brand elements.
Size: 23.5 x 17.5 x 11.5 cm.

items.name_en: Top-tier ✨【HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag】M13084 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
Top-tier ✨【HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag】M13084 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
This Handbag East West Sj bag is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series, featuring the artist's signature rainbow tones to depict the full Monogram pattern. The horizontal silhouette features smooth lines, a top handle, nail side strap, detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, and LV xTM key pouch with calfskin details, while the refined corners pay homage to the brand's traditional trunks.
Size: 27 x 14 x 10 cm

specs.rawTitle:
Top-tier ✨【HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag】M13084 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
This Handbag East West Sj bag is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series, featuring the artist's signature rainbow tones to depict the full Monogram pattern. The horizontal silhouette features smooth lines, a top handle, nail side strap, detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, and LV xTM key pouch with calfskin details, while the refined corners pay homage to the brand's traditional trunks.
Size: 27 x 14 x 10 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier ✨【LV x TM ALL IN BB Handbag】 m13089 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
Top-tier ✨【LV x TM ALL IN BB Handbag】 m13089 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
This All In BB handbag conveys the playful style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series through dynamic details. Monogram Multicolore canvas presents the vibrant rainbow tones from the artist's brush, while the nameplate features a bow and lock decoration. The adjustable calfskin handle and leather shoulder strap allow you to switch between hand-carry, shoulder carry, and crossbody wear.
Size: 18 x 12 x 16 cm
